name: Bulk IP Reputation Check
description: Performs bulk IP reputation assessment by extracting all IP addresses from an alert, iterating over each IP to enrich from VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and Shodan, then categorizing results. AI analysis identifies patterns across IPs such as shared ASNs, geolocation clustering, or known botnet membership. Malicious IPs are automatically blocked on the firewall and added to the threat intel blocklist. Clean IPs are annotated and the alert is closed with an enrichment summary.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: VirusTotal
required_integrations.reason: Check IP reputation including detection ratios, associated malware, and communicating files

required_integrations.name: AbuseIPDB
required_integrations.reason: Retrieve abuse confidence scores and historical abuse reports for each IP

required_integrations.name: Shodan
required_integrations.reason: Gather infrastructure intelligence including open ports, services, and hosting details

config.description: Triggers when an alert containing suspicious IP addresses is ingested for reputation assessment

config.code:
import re

alert = inputs.get('alert', {})
raw_text = str(alert)

ip_pattern = r'\b(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}\b'
private_ranges = ['10.', '172.16.', '172.17.', '172.18.', '172.19.', '172.20.', '172.21.', '172.22.', '172.23.', '172.24.', '172.25.', '172.26.', '172.27.', '172.28.', '172.29.', '172.30.', '172.31.', '192.168.', '127.']

all_ips = list(set(re.findall(ip_pattern, raw_text)))
public_ips = [ip for ip in all_ips if not any(ip.startswith(p) for p in private_ranges)]

ip_list = [{'type': 'ip', 'value': ip} for ip in public_ips]

result = {
    'ip_list': ip_list,
    'total_count': len(public_ips),
    'filtered_private': len(all_ips) - len(public_ips)
}
config.description: Extracts all public IP addresses from the alert, filtering out RFC1918 private ranges
Iterates over each extracted public IP address for individual enrichment
Enriches each IP address against VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and Shodan for comprehensive reputation and infrastructure data

config.additional_instructions: Categorize all enriched IPs by risk level. Identify patterns such as shared ASNs, geolocation clustering, known botnet membership, or C2 infrastructure. Separate IPs into malicious, suspicious, and clean categories.
config.description: AI-powered categorization of enriched IPs identifying patterns, shared infrastructure, and risk levels
Routes based on whether any IPs were categorized as malicious by the enrichment and AI analysis
Blocks all malicious IPs on the firewall to prevent inbound and outbound communication
Adds malicious IPs to the External Dynamic List for automated propagation to all perimeter security controls
Documents that all IPs were assessed as clean with no blocking action required
